tasks.build: cd app && deno run -A npm:vite build
tasks.preview: cd app && deno run -A npm:vite preview
tasks.serve: cargo build --release --manifest-path gateway/wt-sidecar/Cargo.toml && deno task serve:run
tasks.serve:run: cargo run --release --manifest-path gateway/wt-sidecar/Cargo.toml & DIMOS_TRANSPORT=zenoh uv run python -m gateway
tasks.netem:install: sudo install -m755 gateway/scripts/dimos-netem /usr/local/bin/ && echo "$USER ALL=(root) NOPASSWD: /usr/local/bin/dimos-netem" | sudo tee /etc/sudoers.d/dimos-netem
tasks.check: deno check packages/web/src/**/*.ts packages/react/src/**/*.tsx && cd app && deno run -A npm:typescript/tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json
tasks.gen-types: uv run python packages/web/scripts/gen_types.py scenarios/nav.py scenarios/arm.py scenarios/cam.py scenarios/bench.py ../../robot/benchmark/go2_load.py --out app/src/dimos.topics.gen.ts
tasks.dog: DIMOS_TRANSPORT=zenoh uv run dimos --simulation dimsim run go2-load
tasks.dog:vps: MUJOCO_GL=egl DIMOS_TRANSPORT=zenoh uv run dimos --simulation mujoco --mujoco-headless --mujoco-video-fps 5 --mujoco-lidar-fps 1 run go2-load
tasks.load: DIMOS_TRANSPORT=zenoh uv run dimos run load
tasks.load:flood: DIMOS_TRANSPORT=zenoh uv run dimos run load -o go2load.heavy_hz=20 -o go2load.heavy_bytes=1000000
tasks.sim: DIMOS_TRANSPORT=zenoh uv run dimos --simulation mujoco run unitree-go2
tasks.sim:dimsim: DIMOS_TRANSPORT=zenoh uv run dimos --simulation dimsim run unitree-go2
tasks.sim:replay: DIMOS_TRANSPORT=zenoh uv run dimos --replay run unitree-go2
